# backend-services

> Phased backend monorepo for the eBay Inventory Manager. The canonical runtime package is `services/sidecar`, which exposes eBay Sell APIs to MCP-compatible local assistants.

## Getting Started

- [Root README](https://github.com/Ubuntufoo/backend-services/blob/main/README.md): Monorepo overview and workspace commands
- [Sidecar README](https://github.com/Ubuntufoo/backend-services/blob/main/services/sidecar/README.md): Setup, usage, and development guide for the active package
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/Ubuntufoo/backend-services/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Architecture intent and service boundaries

## Active Runtime Surface

- [Account](https://github.com/Ubuntufoo/backend-services/blob/main/services/sidecar/src/tools/definitions/account.ts)
- [Inventory](https://github.com/Ubuntufoo/backend-services/blob/main/services/sidecar/src/tools/definitions/inventory.ts)
- [Marketing](https://github.com/Ubuntufoo/backend-services/blob/main/services/sidecar/src/tools/definitions/marketing.ts)
- [Fulfillment](https://github.com/Ubuntufoo/backend-services/blob/main/services/sidecar/src/tools/definitions/fulfillment.ts)
- [Analytics](https://github.com/Ubuntufoo/backend-services/blob/main/services/sidecar/src/tools/definitions/analytics.ts)
- [Communication](https://github.com/Ubuntufoo/backend-services/blob/main/services/sidecar/src/tools/definitions/communication.ts)
- [Taxonomy](https://github.com/Ubuntufoo/backend-services/blob/main/services/sidecar/src/tools/definitions/taxonomy.ts)
- [Metadata](https://github.com/Ubuntufoo/backend-services/blob/main/services/sidecar/src/tools/definitions/metadata.ts)
- [Developer](https://github.com/Ubuntufoo/backend-services/blob/main/services/sidecar/src/tools/definitions/developer.ts)
- [Trading](https://github.com/Ubuntufoo/backend-services/blob/main/services/sidecar/src/tools/definitions/trading.ts)
- [Token Management](https://github.com/Ubuntufoo/backend-services/blob/main/services/sidecar/src/tools/definitions/token-management.ts)
